extracted_information: The provided web content details MaxMind's GeoIP® Web Services, an IP geolocation API designed to provide accurate IP geolocation data via a fast and reliable API hosted on secure MaxMind servers. It allows users to determine the location of an IP address and access various data points.

features.name: Data Points
features.description: Determine location of an IP address with tailored data points. Includes country, region, city, ZIP/postal code, anonymizer type, user count, confidence factors, static IP score, and more.
